## Description

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Link the issue it closes (e.g. "Closes #123"). -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Refactor / code quality

## Checklist

- [ ] I have linked the related issue (or explained why there is none)
- [ ] I ran `yarn lint:check` and it passed
- [ ] I ran `yarn build` and it passed
- [ ] I added or updated tests for new/changed functionality
- [ ] I ran `./scripts/check-branding.sh` and it passed (no `AnythingLLM` or `Mintplex Labs` strings)
- [ ] I updated `docs/` if the public API or user-facing behaviour changed
- [ ] I redacted secrets, API keys, and passwords from code and logs
